text_block_list.text:
A few days have passed since Mejiro McQueen's remarkable victory 
at the spring Tenno Sho.
Our little team of one has grown at last.

text_block_list.name: Horsegirl with Straight-cut Bangs
text_block_list.text:
From the very first moment I saw your elegance in motion, I knew that 
I just HAD to join!

text_block_list.name: Droopy-eyed Horsegirl
text_block_list.text: Sniff… Your victory… So stunning… I was, sniff… so mooooved!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I-I'm flattered.

text_block_list.name: Horsegirl with Black Bob-cut
text_block_list.text: I want to give it my all and chase my dreams just like you did!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: B-By all means… Please do just that!
Seems like they were all drawn in by your performance, McQueen.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I know… but it's all a touch embarrassing.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant… How was that time?
Six furlongs in a neat eighty seconds. No complaints here!
Six furlongs in a neat eighty seconds. No complaints here!

text_block_list.name: Horsegirl with Black Bob-cut
text_block_list.text: Wooow! So this is what it means to be a Tenno Sho champion!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Oh, goodness! W-Won't you please give me some space?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Though, I must admit, I'm happy to train alongside a lively Team 
Sirius again.
We owe it all to your victory at the spring Tenno Sho!
We owe it all to your victory at the spring Tenno Sho!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
To think that my own running would have such an influence on the 
team…

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Still, we aren't in the clear yet. Let's keep pushing forward, as a team!

text_block_list.name: Horsegirl with Straight-cut Bangs
text_block_list.text: McQueen, can you teach me about good running form?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Of course, I wouldn't mind at all.

text_block_list.name: Droopy-eyed Horsegirl
text_block_list.text: McQueen! How can I leave the gate as deftly as you do?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Let me show you that right now.
McQueen, my tummy hungy. Won't you treat me to some carrot cake?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Yes, that would be no problem at—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Wait, who said that?! I didn't mean that just now!
Duh, it's me. Yo, McQueen!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: G-Gold Ship…

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
"Acquaintance" would be… saying a bit much. She's more like a pest 
who won't leave me be.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Ayy, I watched the Tenno Sho! You were as cool as ever!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Especially that part when ya used your own body as a shield to 
protect your allies from enemy fire!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Nothing of the sort ever happened! What kind of firing is happening 
during a footrace?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
You don't gotta explain anything. We know what we saw! The running 
part practically had me in tears!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
And that's why I came out here. Figured you might be doing some 
more stunt practice!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I don't care if you simply watch, just… Please don't get in the way.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Okay, okay! I'll just zip it and watch, don't worry!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Now, my good fellows, shift your attention toward Irongut McQueen, 
as she enlightens us on how to down a furlong's length of wasabi rolls!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Oh, for the love of—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Phew… Today was quite exhausting…

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: The Tenno Sho really did a number on your leggies, huh?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: For goodness' sake, you have done a number on my patience. That's all.
Gold Ship has a point. You did just finish a big race, after all.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: And I must start preparing for the next. There's no time to waste.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: My ambitions do not simply end with the Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Oh? One lifelong dream right on to the next, eh?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Naturally! As a member of the prestigious Mejiro family, I cannot 
fathom settling.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Besides, I also have a whole team of racers to support.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: …Tryhard.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Of course I'm trying my hardest! This is certainly no time to be fooling 
around!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Heh, good to know. And glad you'll be keepin' those legs on the turf.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
All right, I've decided! You've got another new team member starting 
now!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Huh?!

McQueen's efforts have caught the eyes of many far and wide. And 
thanks to that…

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Woo! Congrats! Not sure what you're talkin' about, but awesome!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: The team may not be disbanded, but I'm still worried nonetheless…
While she has a point in that the team was assembled haphazardly, I genuinely believe that it will be home to true stars.
While she has a point in that the team was assembled haphazardly, I genuinely believe that it will be home to true stars.
Because Sirius has Mejiro McQueen as its guiding light.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Ahoy mateys! Weigh anchor and set sail, Team McQueen!
